title: bupleurum falcatum f. obvallatum
intro: Bupleurum falcatum f. obvallatum is a variant of the Bupleurum falcatum plant, a species of flowering plant in the family Apiaceae. It is also known as Chinese thorowax or Hare's ear. This plant has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, including its anti-inflammatory and antiviral effects. The health benefits of Bupleurum falcatum f. obvallatum include reducing fever, relieving pain and swelling, and supporting the immune system, and it can be prepared for use in herbal teas, tinctures, and capsules.
